name: 白敦文
objective:
本課程由老師指導學生選定題目，進行該題目之問題定義、分析、設計與製作。專題完成後需撰寫書面報告並公開展示成品。專題範圍包含：1. 多媒體系統 2. 電腦網路 3. 軟體分析與設計 4. 影像與音訊處理 5. 微算機應用
In this course, the instructor will guide the students to fulfill a special project through the phases of problem formulation, analysis, design and implementation. The final work should be demonstrated in the public along with a written report. The topics include 1.Multimedia systems 2.Computer networks 3.Software analysis and design 4.Audio and video signal processing 5.Microprocessor-based applications
schedule: 由專題指導老師指定學習進度及內容 (Based on instructor's schedule!)
scorePolicy:
由本系教師與產學專家共同組成評審小組，依據參賽作品之應用領域、創新程
度、與實務或學術價值等項目予以評分。本項評分除做為專題競賽獎勵之依據
外，並佔該學期實務專題課程學期成績之百分之六十。其餘由專題指導老師評定。(Based on instructor's grading results! But the instructor's grading results only contain 60% of the total final score. The rest score will be given by all other faculties during project result presentation.)
materials: 由專題指導老師指定參考資料 (Based on instructor's guides!)
consultation: 詢問專題指導老師 (personal instructor)
課程對應SDGs指標: SDG4：優質教育（Quality Education）SDG5：性別平等（Gender Equality）SDG9：產業創新與基礎設施（Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure）
課程是否導入AI: ● 鼓勵學生使用生成式 AI 工具（Encourage students to use generative AI tools）
remarks: 委由專題指導老師自行安排遠距教學規劃。(If necessary, based on instructor's arrangements!)

consultation: Emails: cmliu@ntut.edu.tw( school); 11107@cc.ntut.edu.tw (Microsoft Teams)Line ID: mobile.profFB: facebook.com/howard.liu.5Phone: 4251 (in school)
課程是否導入AI: ● 鼓勵學生使用生成式 AI 工具（Encourage students to use generative AI tools）● 簡單介紹 AI 的基本概念（Briefly introduce the basic concept of AI）
remarks: For the distance learning, the on-line teaching will be given during the official class hours using Microsoft Teams. In addition, all the related material and homework sets will be released and collected with the NTUT i-school plus (https://istudy.ntut.edu.tw/learn/index.php) platform.
